posts.title: Are You Busy This Month?
posts.caption: Monthly opener. Packed calendar of chores vs. a wide-open beach month with Opendoor.
posts.socialCaption: your whole month, gone. or your whole month, yours. 🏖️

posts.title: World Cup — The Leading O Becomes the Ball
posts.caption: ⚽ Always rooting for the home team — we're on your side when you make your move. (USA vs. Bosnia & Herzegovina, the US's first knockout match, Round of 32, Levi's Stadium.)
posts.socialCaption: knockouts start today. always rooting for the home team. ⚽

posts.title: Skip the Circus — Banner Drop
posts.caption: Reskin of the viral banner-drop stunt (Blue Apron 'hot dogs' post): masked climbers atop a skyscraper mast unfurl a flag reading 'Skip the circus / Skip straight to sold / opendoor.com.' Deadpan, screenshot-y — 'wait, is this real?' energy. Scheduled for AM.
posts.socialCaption: some people really love Opendoor

posts.title: Wimbledon — The Grass Is Truly Greener
posts.caption: 🎾 Grass-season brand post for Wimbledon week 1. A 3×3 grid of green front doors (middle-America mix); 'the grass is truly greener' on the other side of an Opendoor.
posts.socialCaption: turns out the grass really is greener over here. 🎾

posts.title: Some Things Just Go Together — July
posts.caption: Hot dogs + the 4th. Home + Opendoor. The 'go together' series, July edition.
posts.socialCaption: some things just belong together in july. 🇺🇸

posts.title: Fireworks Wordmark
posts.caption: 🎆 Independence Day hero post. Opendoor wordmark amongst the fireworks finale. (3 cuts: gold / finale / blue.)
posts.socialCaption: happy 4th from all of us. 🎆

posts.title: Doctor's Rx — "opendoor.com"
posts.caption: iMessage meme. Relatable hook with the opendoor.com punchline.

posts.title: Wimbledon — Your Own Center Court
posts.caption: 🎾 Finals-day post (Gentlemen's Singles Final). Photoreal striped-lawn backyard: 'the best seat this summer is your own Center Court.'

posts.title: Things That Go Together
posts.caption: PB&J / flag & apple pie / home & Opendoor. The evergreen anchor of the series.

posts.title: Real Progress — Hero + Camera Roll

posts.socialCaption: real families. real moves. real progress. this is the part we love.

posts.title: Red Card — Selling the Old Way
posts.caption: ⚽ Soccer-ref 'red card' carousel timed to the later World Cup rounds (semis Jul 14–15 → final Jul 19). 6 old-way clichés + a goal-celebration Opendoor payoff slide.
posts.socialCaption: red card to the old way. skip it all and just win. ⚽

posts.title: Jersey Crest Reveal — Circular Ring
posts.caption: Final-day World Cup tie-in. Macro satin-stitch embroidery timelapse: an Opendoor circular crest (O door-mark, arced 'OPENDOOR', two stars) self-stitches onto a cobalt-blue jersey over the heart, like a team patch, not a sponsor logo. Gemini omni-flash native video.
posts.socialCaption: Kitted up. Ready to help you make your move.

posts.title: "I Said Try opendoor.com"
posts.caption: Text-exchange series. High-save, screenshot-y format.

posts.title: Tired Too Sis — Cash Offer to Accept
posts.caption: Viral crosswalk cardboard-sign meme (the 'I'M TIRED TOO SIS' format), sign swapped to 'BUT WE HAVE A FREAKING CASH OFFER TO ACCEPT.' Most template-native of the set — leads the series. Page 1 of the FINAL 4 Canva design.
posts.socialCaption: so much on the to-do list this week 😮‍💨

posts.title: Tired Too Sis — The House Won't Sell Itself
posts.caption: Same format, week 2. Sign: 'BUT THE HOUSE WON'T FREAKING SELL ITSELF' — the social caption delivers the flip. Page 2 of the FINAL 4 design.
posts.socialCaption: actually… it will. opendoor.com

posts.title: Tired Too Sis — That's Why I Sold to Opendoor
posts.caption: Series closer, most ad-like payoff: 'THAT'S WHY I SOLD MY HOUSE TO OPENDOOR.' Runs after the format has done its organic work. Page 3 of the FINAL 4 design.
posts.socialCaption: she gets it 🤝

posts.title: Go Together — Back to School

posts.title: Seasons Split — Don't Wait for Spring (Dallas)
posts.caption: Beat-locked seasons-mask reel: a typical $650k Dallas ranch flips summer to fall in 97 accelerating cuts. Canva library asset VAHOsbFNAm8 (v3, blue-field end card). Finals: ~/opendoor/finals/seasons-split-dallas
posts.socialCaption: Don't wait for spring. 🍂

posts.title: Seasons Split — Strike While It's Hot (Charlotte)
posts.caption: Beat-locked seasons-mask reel #2: a Charlotte brick ranch strobes from drab early spring into peak summer (crepe myrtle bloom + sprinkler) in 97 accelerating cuts. Canva library asset VAHOtx8VyeI. Finals: ~/opendoor/finals/seasons-split-charlotte
posts.socialCaption: Strike while it's hot. ☀️

inventory.title: Opendoor Walk Sign — Night (Chicago + Philly)
inventory.caption: Photoreal pedestrian walk signal reskinned Opendoor blue: the don't-walk hand sits unlit while the O glows white — the signal says GO. Chicago (L train) + Philadelphia (City Hall) night scenes. Suggested slot: an open early-August date.

inventory.title: Make It Better — ChatGPT For-Sale Sign
inventory.caption: Reskin of the viral 'text ChatGPT a photo + Make it better.' format. A dull, generic For Sale sign gets texted in; ChatGPT replies 'Done.' with a vivid Opendoor sign in the same shot. Real ChatGPT-app chrome (hamburger + ChatGPT header, compose/more icons), rendered as crisp HTML, not a screenshot.

inventory.title: Tired Too Sis — 27 Showings (alternate)
inventory.caption: Fourth variant of the cardboard-sign series: 'BUT WE ARE NOT DOING 27 SHOWINGS THIS WEEKEND.' A/B alternate or a 4th weekly beat if the format performs. Page 4 of the FINAL 4 design (all 6 raw variants: DAHOLnIoyZg).

inventory.title: Jennifer Chen — The Overlap ("Both")

inventory.socialCaption: Selling your home doesn't have to mean skipping summer. Get a cash offer from Opendoor, pick your close date, and stay for every last golden hour. ☀️ #Opendoor #SellYourHome #SummerVibes #RealEstate #MovingDay

inventory.title: Sold in Under a Week — review-song music video
inventory.caption: Full music video: a Suno pop song built from 50 genuine 5-star reviews. Review cards land in sync with the lyric they are, over a craftsman home with the Opendoor for-sale sign. Ends on a zoom to the sign + big SOLD on the chant. Master: finals/review-wall/reviewsong_full_9x16_v1.mp4 (this URL is the compressed delivery copy).
inventory.socialCaption: We turned our 5-star reviews into a song. Every lyric is a real review. 🎵🏡

inventory.title: Sold in Under a Week — 30s chorus reel

inventory.socialCaption: my only regret is not selling sooner 🎵 (every lyric = a real review)
